title: PDF Chatbot
subtitle: AI-Powered Document Q&A Tool
description: An interactive chatbot that allows users to upload PDF documents and ask questions about their content using modern AI models.
longDescription: Built a PDF-based chatbot that leverages modern AI language models to enable conversational interaction with PDF documents. Users can upload any PDF and ask natural language questions, receiving accurate and contextual answers drawn directly from the document content. The system processes documents through text extraction, chunking, and AI-driven comprehension to deliver precise responses.
challenges: Handling large PDF documents efficiently
Maintaining context across long documents
Ensuring accurate AI-generated responses
Processing different PDF formats and layouts
solutions: Implemented document chunking for efficient processing
Used context-window management for long documents
Integrated robust AI models for accurate comprehension
Built flexible PDF parsing pipeline
results: Successfully enables interactive Q&A with PDF documents
Accurate responses for a variety of document types
Clean, user-friendly interface for document interaction

title: n8n Workflow Automations
subtitle: Automated Task & Data Pipelines
description: A collection of workflow automations built using n8n to streamline repetitive tasks, integrate services, and create efficient data processing pipelines.
longDescription: Designed and implemented multiple workflow automations using n8n, a powerful workflow automation tool. These automations connect various services through API integrations, handle data transformations, and streamline repetitive processes. The workflows range from simple notification systems to complex multi-step data processing pipelines, all deployed in containerized environments using Docker.
challenges: Connecting diverse APIs with different authentication methods
Handling data transformation between services
Ensuring workflow reliability and error recovery
Managing Docker deployments for automation services
solutions: Built modular workflow components for reusability
Implemented error handling and notification systems
Used Docker Compose for reliable deployments
Created documentation for workflow patterns
results: Reduced manual effort through intelligent automation
Built reusable templates for common automation patterns

title: Docker Deployment Configurations
subtitle: Containerized Application Deployments
description: Containerized deployment configurations for various applications using Docker, enabling consistent and reproducible environments.
longDescription: Created comprehensive Docker deployment configurations for various applications and services. This project encompasses Docker Compose setups, Dockerfiles, and deployment scripts that enable consistent, reproducible, and portable application environments. The configurations cover web applications, automation tools, and development environments.
challenges: Optimizing Docker image sizes
Managing multi-container networking
Handling persistent data across container restarts
Cross-platform compatibility
solutions: Used multi-stage builds for smaller images
Configured Docker networks for service communication
Implemented named volumes for data persistence
Tested configurations across different environments

title: AI-Powered Application
subtitle: Intelligent System with AI Integration
description: An AI-powered application that combines modern language models with practical functionality to solve real-world problems.
longDescription: Developing an AI-powered application that integrates modern artificial intelligence models to deliver intelligent features and insights. The project focuses on practical AI applications that go beyond simple demonstrations, aiming to create tools that provide genuine value through smart automation and natural language understanding.
features: AI model integration for intelligent features
challenges: Selecting optimal AI models for the use case
Managing API rate limits and costs
Designing an intuitive user experience around AI features
Ensuring response accuracy and reliability
solutions: Evaluated multiple AI providers for best fit
Implemented caching and request optimization
Designed iterative UI based on user feedback
Built validation layers for AI outputs
results: Practical demonstration of AI integration skills
Foundation for future AI project development

title: Portfolio Website
subtitle: Personal Developer Portfolio
description: A modern, terminal-themed developer portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS to showcase projects and skills.
longDescription: Designed and customized a modern developer portfolio website with a unique terminal/hacker aesthetic. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, the site features animated terminal commands, a scrolling tech stack background, and responsive design. It serves as a central hub to showcase projects, experience, skills, and education.
features: Animated typing effects and command simulation
challenges: Creating an engaging terminal aesthetic
Implementing smooth animations without performance issues
Ensuring responsive design across all screen sizes
Organizing project and experience data effectively
solutions: Used CSS animations and React state for terminal effects
Optimized animations with requestAnimationFrame patterns
Built responsive layouts with Tailwind breakpoints
Structured data in JSON for easy content management
results: Professional online presence for showcasing work
Unique visual identity that stands out
Easy content management through JSON data files
